title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 23-  2017: Roman Timeline fm Roman Calendar

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while working on a personal historical timeline based on the Roman calendar rather than the Christian calendar. He discusses his interest in comparing Roman and American history using AUC dating, mentions quitting weed to be more productive, and shares plans to finish the timeline by end of April.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it meaningful and cool to use Rome's native calendar (AUC) because Romans actually thought in those terms
Believes sobriety will make him more productive and produce better videos
Fascinated by the comparison but acknowledges it is more complicated than expected
Sees a pattern: Rome transitioned from kingdom to republic at year 244, America will be 244 years old in 2020

entities: Turkey (prior location where he worked on timeline in 2011)
